subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the ocean of grace and hath partaken thereof through this wondrous Name, and hath inhaled its fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز ببحر الفضل و شرب منه بهذا الاسم البدیع و وجد نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
